meta.title: Milky Way Browse Prototype
meta.description: A compact JSON scene graph for a first-person-to-galaxy browse experience.

views.label: 01 Immersive Sky
views.title: Inside the local sky
views.description: Start in first person. The band of the Milky Way dominates the sky before labels or structure appear.

views.label: 02 Orion Spur
views.title: Local structure comes into focus
views.description: Zoom back enough to explain where the Sun sits within the Orion Spur while preserving a sense of being embedded in the disk.

views.label: 03 Whole Galaxy
views.title: Pull out to the galaxy model
views.description: The final view is intentionally abstract. It compresses the Milky Way into a readable face-on diagram with only the most important anchors.

landmarks.name: Sun
landmarks.description: Home position in the Orion Spur, offset from the galactic center.

landmarks.name: Galactic Center
landmarks.description: Dense central bulge and the direction of Sagittarius A*.

landmarks.name: Orion Spur
landmarks.description: Minor arm segment that contains the Sun and much of our local neighborhood.
